who: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR processing 10–20 time-off requests/week, inefficient approval workflows cause delays in employee scheduling. We summarize and email requests instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inefficient approval workflows for employee time-off requests
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool sharing
try_it: Let users try summarizing time-off requests and emailing notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
